mapper.select: SELECT A.CA_NUM, A.CA_DATE, C.CLA_TITLE, C.CLA_CONTENT, C.CLA_CATEGORY, C.CLA_STARTDATE, C.CLA_ENDDATE, C.CLA_MAXSTU, E.ER_PASS, E.ER_SCORE, R.REP_NUM FROM ClassApply A JOIN Class C ON A.CLA_NUM = C.CLA_NUM LEFT OUTER JOIN Exam_Result E ON (A.USER_NUM = E.USER_NUM AND A.CLA_NUM = E.CLA_NUM) LEFT OUTER JOIN REPUTATION R ON (A.USER_NUM = R.USER_NUM AND A.CLA_NUM = R.CLA_NUM) WHERE A.USER_NUM = #{userNum} ORDER BY A.CA_DATE DESC
SELECT A.CA_NUM, A.CA_DATE, C.CLA_NUM, C.CLA_TITLE FROM ClassApply A JOIN Class C ON A.CLA_NUM = C.CLA_NUM WHERE A.CA_NUM = #{caNum}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ClassApply(CA_NUM, USER_NUM, CLA_NUM, CA_DATE) VALUES(#{caNum}, #{userNum}, #{claNum}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT SEQ_CLASSAPPLY.NEXTVAL AS CA_NUM FROM DUAL
